judgment: Implementation satisfies the issue #2 base flow: finalized audio master is required, existing realtime rows are replaced only after deferred transcription succeeds, speaker_events are preserved and remapped, Redis live transcript cache is cleared on replace, post-meeting completion only queues work, and sweeps process queued/retryable jobs. Existing-file E2E additionally confirmed real DB/MinIO/transcription-service replacement, including compatibility with text-only STT responses.
residual_risks: Long recordings still use whole-file download, conversion, and transcription.
Codex CLI final polishing worker from the issue comment is not implemented in this base flow.
Speaker attribution still depends on meeting.data.speaker_events quality and timing alignment.
When the STT service returns only text and no timestamped segments, the fallback stores one full-duration segment, so timing granularity is lower than verbose segment output.
